core_definition.W_s: -i Lie derivative along seed-selected Killing field V_s on CP1 ~= S2_Bloch

effect_on_zeta_polar_map: N,S are fixed points of one Killing field; zeta index assignment must respect this geometry and cannot select arbitrary unrelated labels.
non_claims: No proof yet of physical axis selection
No proof yet that a specific twin-prime sector uniquely fixes weak isospin axis
